_comment_1: Example Claude Code settings.json with both hooks installed. MERGE into your own ~/.claude/settings.json or .claude/settings.json — don't replace the file.
_comment_2: Tool name mapping: Claude Code's write-class tools are Edit, Write, NotebookEdit. Codex CLI's unified write tool is apply_patch.
_comment_3: For Codex CLI: move the 'hooks' key into ~/.codex/hooks.json instead, and change the matcher to 'apply_patch'.
